name: @agenttrace-io/sdk
description: Drop-in tracing SDK for AI agents — track tokens, cost, latency, and tool calls

scripts.postinstall: node -e "try{require('better-sqlite3');console.log('✓ better-sqlite3 loaded successfully')}catch(e){console.error('✗ better-sqlite3 failed to load:',e.message);console.error('If you are on Windows with Node 24, install Visual Studio Build Tools:');console.error('  https://visualstudio.microsoft.com/visual-cpp-build-tools/');console.error('Or downgrade to Node 22: nvm install 22 && nvm use 22');process.exit(1)}"
